title: 8 Entering Manual Returns and Reimbursement Requests on ServiceNow
body_text:
8	Entering Manual Returns and Reimbursement Requests on ServiceNow
8.1	Entering Manual Returns on ServiceNow
Create a Manual Cheque Returns Request on ServiceNow to manually dishonour and return a cheque that canГўВҖВҷt be returned on ORS.
Manual returns are only permitted if
the cheque is an Unqualified Item (use ORS to return Qualified Incoming Clearing Items),
the cheque cleared before images were available on ORS,
Note:	See the Online Return System (ORS) Part, Section 1.2, ORS Service Windows, Image Availability, and Archive, for the start dates of the ORS image archive.
the cheque canГўВҖВҷt be returned using ORS (such as a misdirected Chargeback), or
ORS is unavailable.
If ServiceNow is unavailable, follow the contingency procedures. See Chapter 9, Contingency Procedures for Returning Cheques.
To create a Manual Cheque Returns Request on ServiceNow:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
, then select
Production Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select Service Catalogue
Select
Paper Payments
, then select
Manual Cheque Returns Request
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Select Manual Cheque Returns Request
The Manual Cheque Returns Request form is displayed. Completion of the form is self-explanatory. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Manual Cheque Returns Request Form
If the list of returns is large, you can fill out and attach a copy of the Request to Process Cheque Returns spreadsheet. This spreadsheet can be downloaded as an attachment in the ServiceNow ticket.
Note:	For manual return items that arenГўВҖВҷt available on ORS, ensure that you attach a copy of your supporting documentation. Unqualified cheque images are available from Central 1ГўВҖВҷs File and Report Exchange. If cheque images arenГўВҖВҷt available, include an image of your Clearing List Report or similar documentation.
Once Central 1 completes the request, a response is provided via ServiceNow. If applicable, service charges are debited to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs account. Settlement is posted to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Central 1 account. See Chapter 10, Settlement and Reports, for more information.
Important
:	Always log off the Client Centre and close the browser when you step away from your desk or when youГўВҖВҷre finished using the system.
8.2	Entering Manual Reimbursement Requests
Create a Paper Payments and Cash Returns Trace ticket on ServiceNow to
request reimbursement for a fraudulent BC Employment and Assistance Cheque;
request reimbursement for a Canada Customs, GST/HST, excise, or federal taxation bill payment if the cheque used to make the payment is dishonoured by the Drawee financial institution; or
request reimbursement for a dishonoured Government of Canada cheque.
To create a Paper Payments and Cash Returns Trace ticket on ServiceNow:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 7.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 7: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
, then select
Production Applications
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 9.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 9: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Selecting Service Catalogue
Select
Paper Payments
, then select
Paper Payments and Cash Returns Trace Request
. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: Selecting the Paper Payments and Cash Returns Trace Request Form
Complete the Paper Payments and Cash Returns Trace Request page as follows. See Figure 12.
Note:	Fields marked with an asterisk are mandatory.
ГўВ‘
Enter your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs transit number.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Select
other
in the Type of Trace drop-down list.
ГўВ‘Вў
Select the currency of the item.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Enter the amount of the item.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Enter additional comments if necessary.
ГўВ‘ВҘ
Attach the reimbursement request form, the cheque image, and any other supporting documentation.
ГўВ‘ВҰ
Select
Submit
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Figure 12: Paper Payments and Cash Returns Trace Request Page
Once Central 1 completes the request, a response is provided via ServiceNow. If applicable, service charges are debited to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs account. See Chapter 10, Settlement and Reports, for information on settlement.
Important
:	Always log off the Client Centre and close the browser when you step away from your desk or when youГўВҖВҷre finished using the system.
END
